description: Ideal-SQR feasibility study comparing direct and echoed multitone waveform parameterizations.
load_instructions: Load this JSON and inspect `metadata`, `optimizer`, `restricted_operator`, `per_block_metrics`, and `waveform_samples` to reproduce the saved direct or echoed case.

summary_row.target_operator_rule: ideal echoed algebra with identical half targets R_x(theta_n/2) and two finite X_pi refocusing pulses

target_spec.formula: theta_n = min(0.22 pi + 0.58 pi (n mod 2) + 0.06 pi floor(n/2), 0.94 pi)

metadata.target_rule: ideal echoed algebra with identical half targets R_x(theta_n/2) and two finite X_pi refocusing pulses
